name: Pineapple Cream Cheese Pizza
recipeIngredient: 1 pound frozen bread dough (1 loaf), thawed
1 grated peel and juice from 1 lemon
recipeInstructions:
Servings: 16
1. Press dough into 2 greased 12 inch pizza pans.
2. Beat cream cheese, sugar, flour, egg yolks, 1 teaspoon lemon peel and 2 teaspoons lemon juice until smooth. Stir in pineapple.
3. Spread mixture evenly over pizzas to within 1/2 inch of edges.
4. Bake in a 400°F oven for 15 minutes or until browned.
5. Spread each pizza with jam and sprinkle with almonds.
6. Bake 5 more minutes.
